Records.description: Two-loop non-planar three-point function with one off-shell external leg ($p_1^2=s$) and two massless legs ($p_2^2=p_3^2=0$), with four massive internal propagators (mass $m$) and two massless internal propagators ($k_1$ and $p_1-k_1$). The paper computes the maximal cut in Baikov representation using intersection theory of twisted cocycles, identifying a basis of three master integrals on the maximal cut in generic $D$ dimensions and derives the Pfaffian/differential equation system in the variable $x$ defined by $4 m^2/s = (1-x)^2/x$ (alphabet $\{x-1, x, x+1\}$). In the strict $D=4$ limit the basis collapses to two and the geometry is that of an elliptic curve branching at $\{-\rho,-s,s,\rho\}$ with $\rho = \sqrt{s(s+16 m^2)}$. An ISP $D_7 = 2(p_2+k_1)^2 - p_1^2$ is introduced. Computation_level is maximal_cut: master integrals are not evaluated, only the IBP-equivalent intersection-number decomposition and the resulting differential equations are derived.
Records.familyName: two-loop non-planar triangle with massive internal lines
Records.location: Section 2, Eq. (2.10)-(2.11) (diagram and propagators); Section 5 (D=4 elliptic case)

Names: two-loop non-planar triangle with massive internal lines
